notes: PRs #1420,#1426,#1439,#1442,#1450,#1451,#1452,#1454,#1456,#1457,#1463 MERGED. PRs #1429,#1438,#1444 CLOSED. Monthly #1403 closed, April 2026 monthly #1433 active. PR #1431=CMI p-value fix. PR #1432=Delta method CI (closes #336). PR #1435=EconML categorical EM fix. PR #1455=fix KeyError conditional_MI. PR #1460=fix categorical groupby KeyError+FutureWarning in dummy_outcome_refuter (closes #1316). PR #1461=fix estimate_effect_naive list-form treatment_variable (closes #416). PR #1462=fix TwoStageRegression preinstantiated second_stage_model (closes #1335). PR #1464=feat auto-select default method_name (closes #365). PR #1465=fix exact_match_cols in DistanceMatchingEstimator+12 tests (closes #814). PR #1466=test fix flaky classification test. PR #1467=fix multi-treatment PlaceboTreatmentRefuter (closes #251). PR #1468=test gcm.fitting_sampling (13 tests). PR #1470=fix LR pvalue scalar (closes #1019). PR #1471=DUPLICATE of #1470 (recommend closing). PR #1472=fix PropensityBalanceInterpreter wide_to_long->melt+v0 filter (closes #802). New PR=fix isort py_version 38->39+stale numba comment (branch repo-assist/eng-fix-isort-pyversion-20260422). Commented #331,#407 (issue investigation). #1443 #1458 are ISSUEs.

fix_attempts.description: Fix PropensityBalanceInterpreter: replace wide_to_long with melt and fix hardcoded v0 filter. 6 new tests.
Fix LinearRegressionEstimator._test_significance to return scalar float for single treatment
Fix PlaceboTreatmentRefuter to support multiple treatments
Fix 3 bugs in DistanceMatchingEstimator.estimate_effect with exact_match_cols; add 12 tests
Auto-select default estimation method when method_name=None
